answer_facts.label: The Janszoon voyage of 1605–06 becomes the first European expedition to set foot on Australia, although it is mistaken as a part of New Guinea.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: The Janszoon voyage of 1605–06 becomes the first European expedition to set foot on Australia, although it is mistaken as a part of New Guinea.

answer_facts.label: Adolf Hitler orders the Luftwaffe to be re-formed, violating the provisions of the Treaty of Versailles.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: Adolf Hitler orders the Luftwaffe to be re-formed, violating the provisions of the Treaty of Versailles.

answer_facts.label: In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.

answer_facts.label: World War II: US troops reclaim the Philippine island of Corregidor from the Japanese.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: World War II: US troops reclaim the Philippine island of Corregidor from the Japanese.

events_used.text: The Janszoon voyage of 1605–06 becomes the first European expedition to set foot on Australia, although it is mistaken as a part of New Guinea.
Adolf Hitler orders the Luftwaffe to be re-formed, violating the provisions of the Treaty of Versailles.
In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.
World War II: US troops reclaim the Philippine island of Corregidor from the Japanese.
